name: OpenIPAHound 97 Utility - Principal Effective Expansion
description: Expands membership and RBAC inheritance from users, groups, services, and computers. Use this to answer 'what does this principal inherit?' before pivoting to the stricter outbound-control or host-access queries.
query:
MATCH p=(principal)-[:IPA_MemberOf|IPA_HasRole|IPA_HasPrivilege|IPA_ContainsPermission*1..6]->(target)
WHERE principal:IPA_User OR principal:IPA_Group OR principal:IPA_Service OR principal:IPA_Computer
RETURN p, coalesce(principal.uid, principal.cn, principal.principal, principal.fqdn) AS principal_name
LIMIT 1000
